name: Apple Business Co
fmcsa_status: ACTIVE; Not Authorized for interstate for-hire
entity_status: active (operating as part of First Student since 2022)
registry_source: Missouri Secretary of State; D&B/Manta; First Student newsroom
notes: Input address '204 Mound St, Mound City, MO 64470' is a satellite/depot location of Apple Bus Company (D&B and Manta both list firststudentinc.com as the website). The flagship USDOT 1061395 carrier is registered in Cleveland, MO (HQ). A separate USDOT 3828014 'APPLE BUS CO' exists in Excelsior Springs, MO with only 1 power unit (likely unrelated). Apple Bus Company was acquired by First Student in April 2022; ~1,500 buses across 80+ districts. Per local listings the Mound City storefront is reported 'closed' as a standalone listing — operations continue under parent.

name: George's Transportation Co
fmcsa_status: ACTIVE; Not Authorized for interstate for-hire (intrastate only)
officers: Leon A. George II (principal); George Family (4 generations)
registry_source: PA Department of State (Bureau of Corporations); company website lgschoolbuses.com
notes: Exact address match on FMCSA SAFER (84 Ashtown Dr, Lehighton, PA 18235). DBA 'George's Busing Inc'. Serves Palmerton Area SD, Lehighton Area SD, and Carbon Career & Technical Institute. Member of PA School Bus Association. Zero crashes / zero OOS inspections in last 24 months. A second SAFER record 'GEORGE'S TRANSPORTATION LLC' (USDOT 3260238) is in New Milford, CT and is unrelated.

name: Florida Bus Unlimited
carrier_operation: unknown (entity was a Thomas Built bus DEALERSHIP, not a school bus operator)
inc_date: ~1981 (operated ~25 years as 'First Class Coach and Equipment Inc.' before 2006 rebrand to Florida Bus Unlimited)
officers: Jim Bay (President at time of 2006 employee-buyout)
registry_source: Thomas Built Buses newsroom; Florida Sunbiz (direct entity record not retrievable); School Bus Fleet
notes: Critical correction: 'Florida Bus Unlimited' at 1925 W Princeton St, Orlando was a Thomas Built Buses DEALERSHIP (sales/parts/service to Florida school bus market) — not a fleet operator. Renamed from 'First Class Coach and Equipment Inc.' in June 2006 when it became employee-owned. Matthews Buses Inc. acquired select assets in 2008 and Matthews Bus Alliance now serves the Orlando Thomas Built market. No carrier (USDOT) record found in SAFER for this entity; appears dissolved/succeeded by Matthews. This is likely NOT a viable tuck-in target — flag as non-operator.

name: Schwartz Bus Svc Inc
registry_source: D&B/Manta/Yellow Pages/SIC Code directories; SBA PPP loan record (federalpay.org)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found for 'Schwartz Bus Service' / 'Schwartz Bus Svc' in Jonesburg, MO. Consistent with an intrastate-only Missouri school bus operator (MO does not require USDOT for purely intrastate school bus service). Company located at 315 Cedar Ave (mailing/corporate) with operations at 450 1st St, Jonesburg, MO 63351. NAICS 485510 (Charter Bus Industry) / SIC 4142. Reports ~40 jobs (per 2020 SBA PPP loan of $104,370). Phone (636) 488-5348. Operating since 1982. Missouri Secretary of State entity record could not be retrieved directly (403 from BSD).

name: Martini School Bus Co Drs
fmcsa_address: 46 S Hunter Highway, Drums, PA 18222 (mailing: PO Box 100, Duncannon, PA 17020)
officers: David Schrantz / J. Schrantz (per email jschrantz@rohrerbus.com); part of Rohrer Bus family (4th generation)
registry_source: FMCSA MCMIS; Rohrer Bus website; PA Dept of State (not directly retrieved)
notes: USDOT 1155731 confirmed for 'MARTINI SCHOOL BUS COMPANY INC' at Drums, PA (input 'Drs' = Drums abbreviation). SAFER record is currently INACTIVE — entity appears to have been folded into Rohrer Bus Companies (mailing address Duncannon, PA matches Rohrer HQ; contact email is @rohrerbus.com). Historical fleet 65 power units / 55 drivers. Serves Hazleton Area School District. FMCSA fined a related 'Martini Inc' (USDOT 211995, Drums PA) $8,720 for drug/alcohol testing program violations. Effectively operates under Rohrer Bus brand today — likely NOT independently acquirable.
